name: migrate-to-wechat-mini-program
title: migrate web app to WeChat mini program
creator: codex

subtasks.title: Phase 1: WeChat login and mobile token backend
Phase 2: existing account binding, phone, unionid
Phase 3: device sessions, token revoke, account merge governance

notes: Use Taro + React + TypeScript. Miniapp auth uses WeChat login and mobile token. Web admin stays on session cookie + CSRF. miniapp typecheck and build:weapp pass; backend mobile auth endpoints are now implemented, remaining work is WeChat tool verification and later phases.
